arts.ttl: Emery praises 'fantastic' substitutes after Villa win
arts.sum: Aston Villa head coach Unai Emery praises his side's "fantastic" performance against Southampton, with goals from substitutes Ollie Watkins, Donyell Malen and John McGinn.

arts.ttl: Watkins fires Aston Villa into top five despite penalty pain at Southampton
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins climbed off the bench to help fire Aston Villa back into the Champions League places after a 3-0 win over Southampton. Villa were labouring against the already-relegated Saints until Watkins struck, just seven minutes after replacing Marcus Rashford and four minutes after Marco Asensio had missed a penalty which Watkins had won. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Villa inflict latest defeat on sorry Southampton
arts.sum: Aston Villa took time to break down home resistance before earning a 3-0 win at relegated Southampton in the Premier League on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery’s ‘Bizarre’ Marcus Rashford Decision Almost Cost Aston Villa in UCL Hunt
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford didn't have a huge impact on Aston Villa's win at Southampton - but the finger is being pointed at Unai Emery.

arts.ttl: John Townley's Aston Villa player ratings after 3-0 win at Southampton
arts.sum: Unai Emery made changes in the 66th minute, bringing on Donyell Malen and Ollie Watkins for Marcus Rashford and Jacob Ramsey. Fellow substitute Malen then doubled Villa's lead in the 79th minute, drilling the ball past Ramsdale after being found on the right by Morgan Rogers.

arts.ttl: Southampton 0-3 Aston Villa: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Ollie Watkins fires Unai Emery into Champions League spot
arts.sum: Unai Emery's Aston Villa left it late but moved into the Champions League places with a 3-0 Premier League win over relegated Southampton at St Mary's on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Ollie Watkins the hero as Aston Villa see off stubborn Southampton to go fifth
arts.sum: Watkins came off the bench to score the opener.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest v Everton, Brighton v Leicester and more: clockwatch – live

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool rival Newcastle & Villa for surprise €12m signing
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly one of the clubs eyeing up a surprise potential transfer move for a new goalkeeper who could cost around €12m. The Reds already have Alisson Becker and Caoimhin Kelleher on their books at Anfield, while Giorgio Mamardashvili is also due to join the club this summer after staying for one more year […] The post Report: Liverpool rival Newcastle & Villa for surprise €12m signing appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa team news vs Southampton confirmed as Rashford and Asensio start
arts.sum: Aston Villa team news vs Southampton confirmed as Rashford and Asensio start Aston Villa manager Unai Emery has named his starting XI to face Southampton in the Premier League this afternoon.
